head: ef921d0161c9b85fdbc635aef54252a8712a00da
summary: Implementation and focused tests are sound, but required verification and PR gate artifacts remain bound to the pre-rebase HEAD.

findings.detail: Verification artifacts are strict-bound to 5c00238 while the reviewed HEAD is ef921d0; rerun and rerecord at current HEAD.
PR and gate summaries still describe the pre-rebase state and must be regenerated after current-head verification.
